compiled_state.title: Central typed Config dataclass (extend src/rebar/config.py)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Introduce a single typed Config (stdlib dataclass) as the source of truth, extending the existing src/rebar/config.py (55 LOC) per the module-size policy — do NOT spawn a sub-100-LOC file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Typed Config dataclass with defaults for the live keys (verify.require_signature_for_close, ticket.display_mode) + validation
- [ ] Loud handling of unknown keys (warn) — no silent drop
- [ ] Unit tests for parse/validate/defaults
Blocked by the ADR task.

comments.body:
COMPLETE config-key inventory (from the interactive env-var review; the typed Config must cover all of these, env overrides file). SETTINGS (config-file keys, [tool.rebar]):
- verify.require_signature_for_close (alias verify.require_verdict_for_close)
- ticket.display_mode
- compact.threshold (10)
- sync.push (always/async/off), sync.pull (on/off, default on)
- mcp.readonly, mcp.allow_llm, mcp.allow_jira_sync
- llm.model, llm.model_provider, llm.base_url, llm.max_tokens, llm.max_steps, llm.timeout, llm.repo_path, llm.mcp_servers (TOML nested, not JSON-in-env)
- jira.url, jira.user, jira.project
- reconciler.jira_cli_timeout, reconciler.lock_max_retries, reconciler.deletion_probe_limit, reconciler.id_guard_bypass_unsafe (bool, default false)
- scratch.base_dir
SECRETS (env/.env ONLY, NOT in the typed config file): REBAR_SIGNING_KEY, REBAR_LLM_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY, LANGFLOW_API_KEY, JIRA_API_TOKEN.
REMOVED keys (do NOT carry forward): paths.*, planning.external_dependency_block_enabled, rebar_id_guard_mode (-> reconciler.id_guard_bypass_unsafe). NOT config (derived/runtime): llm.runner (derive from langflow config), REBAR_LLM_REPO_PATH (runtime). Each env override is REBAR_<KEY> with the precedence CLI > env > project > user > defaults.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CORRECTION: llm.repo_path is NOT a config-file key (the earlier inventory listed it both ways). REBAR_LLM_REPO_PATH is a RUNTIME, invocation-specific override (which repo the agent reads) -> env-only, not a persistent [tool.rebar] setting. Authoritative per the approved Cluster B decision. Documented in docs/config.md (Runtime-only section).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: DONE: typed Config added to src/rebar/config.py — stdlib dataclass (no pydantic), CORE sections (verify/ticket/compact/sync/mcp/reconciler/jira/scratch) with the decided defaults; from_mapping coerces+validates (incl. bool-rejected-as-int guard, case-insensitive choices), honors the verify legacy alias (new key wins), and WARNS (never silently drops) on unknown sections/keys; invalid values raise ConfigError (fail-closed at load). llm.* intentionally excluded (stays in rebar.llm so core stays decoupled from the agents extra). 14 unit tests (defaults/coercion/validation/unknown-warn/alias). Subagent-reviewed: solid, no bugs; the one design note (sparse-merge for layering) recorded on 43a0/83e6. Unit tier green (231 passed). NOTE: location/precedence/portability verification is deferred to 43a0 (loader) where it is meaningful.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
